name: Kuritsa s Paprikoy (Chicken Paprikash)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large Dutch oven over medium-low heat.
2. Add the onion and sauté, stirring occasionally, until softened; about 5 minutes.
3. Add the paprika and stir until the onions turn reddish brown.
4. In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat until it sizzles.
5. Brown the chicken on all sides. Drain on a paper towel.
6. Transfer the chicken to the Dutch oven with the onions.
7. Add the peppers and cook over medium heat, stirring, for five minutes.
8. Stir in the tomatoes, salt and pepper, marjoram, and stock.
9. Reduce the heat to low, cover the pot tightly, and simmer until the chicken is very tender; about 40 minutes.
10. Meanwhile, whisk together the sour cream and heavy cream in a small bowl.
11. With a slotted spoon, transfer the chicken to a heated platter.
12. Whisk a little of the hot sauce into the sour cream mixture.
13. Add the mixture to the sauce in the Dutch oven.
14. Reduce over high heat until slightly thickened.
15. Serve the chicken with the sauce spooned over it, sprinkled with a little paprika and parsley.
